Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Reid Harada appeared via zoom for Mary Tilton (petitioner).
Jessica Novotny appeared via zoom for Debra Helgren. (Petitioner).

The Court hears no objections from parties. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Jessica Novotny, Esq., via Zoom, for Petitioner.

No other appearances.

Counsel advises that she appeared today after being advised of an appearance to object. This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-06-2003 is admitted to probate. Debra Helgen is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed full authority. Bond is Fixed at $1,735,000. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-19-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
